children.text: that country is engaged in international activities directly and fundamentally contrary to United States national security interests;
the president or any other government official of that country initiates martial law or a state of emergency for reasons other than to respond to a natural disaster or a foreign invasion; or
any member who was elected to that country’s parliament has been removed from that office or arrested through extraconstitutional processes.
